content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Abstract: Full Stack Web Developer ⏤ Remote Contractor Anywhere in the World Analytics, Cross-Browser Development, Database, Decision Frameworks, Google Analytics, Computer Vision, DevOps, Hardware/Software Support, Cross-Selling, and Analytics Tools Back-End Programming Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5534/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Stuttgart, DE <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://theabstract.co">http://theabstract.co</a> </p> <div class="description"><h2><strong>Who We Are</strong></h2> <p>Abstract is where excellence meshes with 3D technology and innovation. We engineer groundbreaking solutions that empower you to elevate your digital experiences to new heights without compromising the vision. From award-winning <a href="https://www.youtube.com/@InstaLOD">optimization technology</a>, scalable <a href="https://www.youtube.com/@InstaMAT_io">material creation and authoring tools</a>, to seamless scan processing and advanced rendering technologies — we’re at the forefront of reshaping how 3D content is imagined, created, and utilized through automation.</p> <p>But, none of this could be possible without an exceptional team, hungry to learn and determined to challenge the status quo. At Abstract, we foster a culture where every constructive input — from the smallest kernel to the grandest blueprint — is seen, thoroughly evaluated, and brought to life through our unwavering pursuit of excellence.</p> <h2><strong>The Opportunity</strong></h2> <p>As a Full Stack Web Developer, you’ll cover the full gamut: from designing and implementing scalable architectures to testing and optimizing for performance, security, and reliability. </p> <p>You understand the importance of crafting intuitive UI/UX touchpoints that delight. Maintaining our codebase, and adding new features and microservices, make you the forefront of our expansion efforts. With multiple projects in the pipeline, there are ample opportunities to expand our web presence and drive innovation across diverse initiatives.</p> <h3><strong>What You Can Bring</strong></h3> <ul><li>Deep understanding of HTML5, CSS3, and responsive design principles</li><li>Experience building highly scalable and secure web applications leveraging Node.js, React.js, and Typescript </li><li>Profiency with databases such as MySQL and MongoDB; TypeORM experience is a must</li><li>Solid knowledge of REST and GraphQL</li><li>Experience with cloud services like AWS (EC2, S3, RDS) and Docker-based workflows</li><li>Comfortable with CI/CD workflows, preferably via Bitbucket pipelines</li><li>Interest in working with cutting-edge frameworks such as Svelte or Tailwind CSS</li></ul> <h2><em></em><strong>About Us</strong></h2> <p>Abstract is a group of companies focused on developing bleeding-edge 3D technology:<br><br><a href="https://instalod.com/">InstaLOD</a> | <a href="https://instamaterial.com/">InstaMAT</a> | <a href="https://instareconstruct.com/">InstaREC</a> | <a href="https://rsxengine.com/">RSX Engine</a> | <a href="https://hello.polyverse.cloud/">Polyverse</a></p> <p>Our technology enables a diverse range of clients to complete projects on time, achieve significant cost savings, and enjoy the process. From leading AAA game developers like <a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-Q90L_3wzzQ">Sega</a>, Activision and <a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ibi0GS_yJ4k&amp;t=47s">Phoenix Labs</a>, to the tech-powered creative giants at <a href="https://docs.instalod.io/Case_Studies/Accenture_Song">Accenture Song</a> or technology conglomerates like <a href="https://docs.instalod.io/Case_Studies/Kakao">Kakao</a>, as well as major automotive manufacturers such as Ford and Daimler, and aerospace and defense companies like <strong></strong> utilizing our solutions for training and simulation — our products are trusted across industries.<br></p> <a href="https://theabstract.co/"></a></div> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/abstract-full-stack-web-developer-remote-contractor">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/abstract-full-stack-web-developer-remote-contractor</a></p> All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to, and will not be discriminated against based on, race, gender, color, religion, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, veteran status, disability or other protected category.</p></div><div><p class="googlejobs-paragraph--empty"></p><h2 class="title">Job Description</h2></div><div class="wysiwyg"><p>ShipERP is looking for PHP Web Developer to design and develop a web application that is compatible with both LAMP and WAMP stacks in high-availability environment. This is a permanent position in Ortigas in the Stock Exchange building.</p></div><div><p class="googlejobs-paragraph--empty"></p><h2 class="title">Qualifications</h2></div><div class="wysiwyg"><ul><li>PHP Web development (5 yrs)</li><li>MySQL (5 yrs)</li><li>HTML5 (2 yrs)</li><li>CSS 3 (5 yrs)</li><li>JavaScript (5 yrs)</li><li>Experience with RequireJS</li><li>Experience with jQuery and Bootstrap frameworks (3 yrs)</li><li>Experience with developing responsive web applications</li><li>Experience with JSON/XML and developing REST web services (SOAP a plus)</li><li>Experience with Enterprise Software (B2B)</li><li>Experience with agile development methodologies, and
